## What changed

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Other

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run type-check`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] If packaging-related: `npm pack --dry-run`

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused and scoped.
- [ ] I updated docs when behavior/API changed.
- [ ] I added or updated tests when needed.
